headline: Is Cummins Stock Outperforming the S&P 500?
summary: Cummins has considerably outperformed the S&P 500 recently, and analysts remain moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Citi Opens 90-Day Upside Catalyst Watch on Parker-Hannifin (PH) Ahead of Q4 Results
summary: With a net profit margin of 16.58%, Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) is included among the 10 Most Profitable Dividend Stocks to Invest In Now. Citi opened a “90-day upside catalyst watch” on Parker-Hannifin Corporation (NYSE:PH) on June 8. The firm reiterated its Buy rating and $1,141 price target on the stock. It said it remains optimistic […]
